column1: "candidate": "# Project Requirements Summary for Industrial Data Platform\n\n*The Industrial Data Platform is a scalable system for real-time and batch processing of industrial sensor
column6: and reporting via a web dashboard. Key features include MQTT/REST data ingestion
column9: and integration with existing industrial protocols. The platform excludes predictive analytics or machine learning capabilities but supports Python 3.8+
column11: and PostgreSQL. Target users are developers
